name: Workflow Transition Idempotency
goal: Make every explicit workflow transition use caller-side state preflight and a shared server-side same-target changed:false no-op without state, artifact, flag, wave, hook, timestamp, or audit side effects.

tasks.name: Centralize and make explicit workflow transitions idempotent
tasks.description: TDD the shared transactional workflow-transition path and route every explicit state-manager transition through it. Same-target detection precedes prerequisites, review gates, callbacks, timestamps, artifacts, flags, waves, and audits. Preserve compound create_plan/reset behavior and provider-native identity binding.

steps.description: Create the Vitest in-memory regression suite with full session/design/task/review snapshots, including both review_grades and tier_up_reviews, plus plan-history and audit snapshots. Cover same-target mark_design_ready, mark_plan_ready, mark_brainstorming, mark_debugging, start_execution, mark_executing, and both retreat targets; assert exact success:true, changed:false, from, to, session_id and deep before/after equality including updated_at. Cover valid changed:true transitions with one audit, invalid different-state errors with no mutation, revised create_plan reload from final_plan_prep, reset_session cleanup from idle, and idempotentHint metadata only on explicit transition tools. Add an audit-insert trigger that raises ABORT during a valid changed transition and prove the thrown database failure rolls back both stage mutation and audit with full snapshot equality.
Run the new focused suite and record exact RED counts. Existing handlers must fail for rejection, mutation, missing result fields, or metadata while compound-operation preservation remains green.
steps.expected: FAIL with exact evidence for current same-target defects; compound-operation preservation tests remain green.

steps.description: In state-machine.ts add one exported transactional workflow-transition outcome/helper. It must re-read only the dispatcher-resolved native session, return changed:false before validation/callback/mutation when current equals target, validate different-state requests through the existing state machine plus explicitly tested execution recovery, run guards/artifact callbacks only for changed valid transitions, update stage and transition fields once, insert exactly one audit, and return changed:true. Refactor retreat artifact preservation so it does not separately update stage or audit.

In write-tools.ts route mark_design_ready, mark_plan_ready, mark_brainstorming, mark_debugging, start_execution, mark_executing, and retreat through the helper; map exact MCP success/error results; place tier-up/review guards after the helper's equality defense; preserve active-task execution recovery with one correction audit; mark only explicit transitions idempotent. Keep create_plan/reset domain work active at same stage while omitting redundant workflow-stage assignments/claims.

Run focused and related state-manager suites covering idempotency, review gates, revised plan reload, session identity, dispatch, and diagnostics. Report exact file/test counts and stop on any failure.
steps.command: npm --prefix worker/mcp-servers/state-manager test -- src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts src/__tests__/mark-executing-review-gate.test.ts src/tools/write-tools.test.ts src/tools/write-tools.tier-up.test.ts src/__tests__/session-identity.test.ts src/__tests__/tool-dispatch.test.ts src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts
steps.expected: All selected test files and tests pass; no required case is skipped.

steps.description: Stage only the Task 1 source and test files; do not commit.
steps.expected: Exactly the three Task 1 paths are added to the staged work; no commit exists.

tasks.name: Enforce caller preflight and suppress no-op hook effects
tasks.description: TDD identity-bound caller preflight in workflow skills, same-target skip in skill-state-bridge, and changed:false suppression in mcp-state-logger. Preserve create_plan reload and unrelated workflow behavior.

steps.description: Create pytest skill-contract tests requiring get_resume_state, provider-native session_id verification, workflow_stage comparison, equal-target skip, one different-target call, fail-closed identity handling, and no blind retry before mark_brainstorming, mark_design_ready, mark_plan_ready, start_execution, mark_executing, and retreat. Assert stage equality never skips create_plan reload. Assert the direct caller inventory is exact: no current skill directly calls mark_debugging because systematic-debugging reaches debugging through skill-state-bridge; do not require or introduce a duplicate skill-side transition.

Create an executable Bash harness with temporary HOME/WAL database/config. Use systematic-debugging as the real hook caller into debugging: assert a same-target payload leaves complete session/audit snapshots and stdout unchanged, then assert the same payload from an allowed different stage mutates/audits once. Verify mcp-state-logger parses tool_output object/string plus legacy tool_response so changed:false is silent and changed:true logs once. Add malformed object, string, and MCP content text inputs; require exit 0, no transition output, and byte-for-byte unchanged session/audit snapshots.
Run the skill-contract suite and record exact RED evidence.
steps.expected: FAIL because current skill transition instructions lack mandatory preflight/skip contracts.

steps.description: Run the hook harness and record exact RED evidence.
steps.expected: FAIL because same-target bridge calls still update/audit and the MCP logger ignores changed:false.

steps.description: Update brainstorming, writing-plans, and executing-plans transition instructions with one shared behavioral contract: get_resume_state; validate current provider-native root session_id; skip when workflow_stage equals target; otherwise call once; require changed:true for requested different-state transition; report errors and do not retry without a fresh read. Apply before debugging return, design ready, plan ready, execution start, review return, and retreat. Keep create_plan explicitly outside stage-only skipping.

Update skill-state-bridge.sh to exit the workflow-transition path before DB write, activation audit, or hook output when CURRENT_STAGE equals TARGET_STAGE; do not change any active-skill or flag field on that path. Update mcp-state-logger.sh to parse tool_output first and legacy tool_response, including objects, JSON strings, and MCP content[].text; exit before DB read/log on changed:false; retain best-effort logging for changed/legacy output and never mutate state on malformed data.
Run focused Commander skill contracts including the existing anti-flailing contracts and report exact counts.
steps.expected: All selected Commander tests pass.

steps.description: Run the hook harness and require every case to print PASS with exit code 0.
steps.expected: All hook cases pass; no same-target state or log side effects.

steps.description: Stage exactly the seven Task 2 paths; do not commit.
steps.command: git add commander/tests/test_workflow_transition_preflight.py worker/hooks/tests/test-workflow-transition-idempotency.sh worker/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md worker/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md worker/skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md worker/hooks/skill-state-bridge.sh worker/hooks/mcp-state-logger.sh
steps.expected: Exactly the seven Task 2 paths are added to staged work; no commit exists.

tasks.name: Build, verify, hot-deploy, and record Wave 1 evidence
tasks.description: Rebuild generated state-manager distribution, repair the evidence-backed Codex cachebuster/version-consistency contract, run every focused and complete regression gate, validate and cachebust the local plugin, reinstall from the authorized local marketplace, prove SHA-256 parity, and write restart-pending evidence. Tasks 1 and 2 own transition coverage; this task adds only the focused Commander contract required by its cachebuster deployment step.

steps.description: Build TypeScript and generated state-manager distribution.
steps.expected: TypeScript and esbuild succeed; dist/index.js contains the verified implementation.

steps.description: Run the full focused state-manager gate and report exact counts.
steps.command: npm --prefix worker/mcp-servers/state-manager test -- src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts src/__tests__/mark-executing-review-gate.test.ts src/tools/write-tools.test.ts src/tools/write-tools.tier-up.test.ts src/__tests__/session-identity.test.ts src/__tests__/tool-dispatch.test.ts src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts
steps.expected: All selected files/tests pass; identity, dispatch, diagnostics, review gates, and revised-plan reload remain green.

steps.description: Run focused Commander contracts.
steps.expected: All selected Commander tests pass.

steps.description: Run the hook harness.
steps.expected: Every hook case prints PASS and exits 0.

steps.description: Use the captured full-suite RED (test_version_sources_match rejected 1.0.24+codex.20260720062826 while 1989 tests passed) and add focused parameterized cases for a pure Codex-manifest release-version helper: unchanged release version without metadata; one valid +codex.<lowercase-alphanumeric-or-hyphen-token> suffix normalized to its release prefix; empty, repeated, non-Codex, or malformed metadata rejected. Run before implementation.
steps.expected: RED because the normalizer does not exist or the raw cachebusted Codex version still participates in exact release-version equality.

steps.description: Implement the smallest helper in commander/tests/test_version_consistency.py and apply it only to worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json; keep Commander, Claude plugin, marketplace, and any Makefile version exact. Rerun focused version consistency.
steps.expected: All version-consistency cases pass for the current cachebusted manifest and invalid metadata remains rejected.

steps.description: Run the complete state-manager suite.
steps.expected: Every state-manager test file and test passes.

steps.description: Run the complete Commander regression suite; do not substitute a narrow suite even though this is long-running.
steps.expected: Complete Commander suite passes with exact counts.

steps.description: Check unstaged patch whitespace.
steps.expected: No whitespace errors in unstaged changes.

steps.description: Check staged patch whitespace so Tasks 1 and 2 cannot evade the gate.
steps.expected: No whitespace errors in staged changes.

steps.description: Validate the source plugin before cachebusting.
steps.expected: Plugin validation passed.

steps.description: Replace the prior Codex cachebuster while preserving base version 1.0.24.
steps.expected: One new 1.0.24+codex.<timestamp> version is written.

steps.description: Re-run plugin validation after cachebusting.
steps.expected: Plugin validation passed.

steps.description: Re-run the focused version-consistency contract against the final cachebusted source manifest.
steps.expected: All version-consistency tests pass after the final cachebuster mutation.

steps.description: Confirm the configured IronClaude marketplace is the local repository.
steps.expected: Marketplace ironclaude root is /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude.

steps.description: Reinstall IronClaude from the local marketplace.
steps.expected: Plugin installs successfully and reports the new cache path.

steps.description: Read the cachebusted manifest version and compare SHA-256 for the manifest, transition sources/test/dist, three skills, two hooks, and hook harness between worker source and the exact installed cache. Stop on missing or mismatched pairs.
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
IRONCLAUDE_W1_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json').version")
IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE="/Users/roberthyatt/.codex/plugins/cache/ironclaude/ironclaude/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_VERSION"
test -d "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE"
for IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL in '.codex-plugin/plugin.json' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/state-machine.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js' 'skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md' 'skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md' 'skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md' 'hooks/skill-state-bridge.sh' 'hooks/mcp-state-logger.sh' 'hooks/tests/test-workflow-transition-idempotency.sh'; do
  test -f "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  test -f "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  cmp -s "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL" "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  echo "MATCH $IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL $(shasum -a 256 "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL" | awk '{print $1}')"
done
steps.expected: Every required source/installed pair reports MATCH.

steps.description: Write docs/validation/2026-07-20-workflow-transition-idempotency.md with requirement/design/plan paths, root cause, transition RED/GREEN and full-suite counts, captured version-consistency RED plus focused and post-cachebuster GREEN counts, build/validation/install evidence, version/cache path, one hash row per file, side-effect-free and MP-W11 evidence, real mark_debugging/systematic-debugging caller topology, the complete MP-001 through MP-C07 named future-loop mapping with explicit release-blocking status, restart-pending status plus same-task resume instruction, queued Wave 11 requirements_file schema mismatch, and explicit no-commit/no-push statement.
Stage built distribution and manifest; do not commit.
steps.expected: Version-consistency regression, generated distribution, and manifest are staged.

steps.description: Force-stage the ignored validation artifact; do not commit or push.
steps.expected: Validation evidence is staged. Submit Task 3 for review; after a passing review, leave Task 4 pending and stop for a full Codex quit/restart of this same task before marking Wave 1 complete.

tasks.name: Resume after restart and prove live runtime activation
tasks.description: After Task 3 passes review, fully quit and relaunch Codex, reopen this same native task, verify the cachebusted plugin is loaded, prove session and durable-plan continuity, rerun source/cache parity and state-manager diagnostics, and finalize activation evidence without changing source.

steps.description: After full Codex quit/relaunch, reopen this same task and call mcp__state_manager__get_resume_state({}) before any transition. Verify native session_id equals this Codex thread ID, professional mode is on, plan name is Workflow Transition Idempotency, Tasks 1-3 are review-passed, Task 4 is pending or in progress, and workflow stage is valid for execution resume. Do not create a new task or reload a different plan.
steps.expected: Durable plan and provider-native task identity resume exactly; any missing, ambiguous, or mismatched identity blocks completion.

steps.description: Confirm the reloaded Codex process reports the cachebusted IronClaude version from the source manifest and the local marketplace.
steps.expected: ironclaude@ironclaude reports the exact worker manifest version and marketplace /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude.

steps.description: Re-run the exact deterministic Step 3 source/cache comparison after restart.
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
IRONCLAUDE_W1_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json').version")
IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE="/Users/roberthyatt/.codex/plugins/cache/ironclaude/ironclaude/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_VERSION"
test -d "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE"
for IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL in '.codex-plugin/plugin.json' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/state-machine.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/write-tools.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts' 'mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js' 'skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md' 'skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md' 'skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md' 'hooks/skill-state-bridge.sh' 'hooks/mcp-state-logger.sh' 'hooks/tests/test-workflow-transition-idempotency.sh'; do
  test -f "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  test -f "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  cmp -s "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL" "$IRONCLAUDE_W1_CACHE/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL"
  echo "MATCH $IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL $(shasum -a 256 "worker/$IRONCLAUDE_W1_REL" | awk '{print $1}')"
done
steps.expected: All eleven source/installed pairs report MATCH from the cache directory named by the exact loaded version.

steps.description: Call mcp__state_manager__run_diagnostics({}) through the reloaded state manager and require every check to pass with hook and MCP resolution bound to this same native Codex task; diagnostics must report no fallback, collision, cross-client identity, or live-state mutation.
steps.expected: Every diagnostic passes and both ingress paths resolve this task's native Codex session ID.

steps.description: Replace restart-pending in the validation artifact with restart timestamp, same-task session ID, loaded version/cache path, post-restart hashes, diagnostic counts/identity evidence, runtime-active: verified, and no-commit/no-push confirmation.
Force-stage the finalized ignored validation artifact; do not commit or push.
steps.expected: Final live-activation evidence is staged. A passing Task 4 review completes Roadmap Wave 1 and permits Wave 2 brainstorming.
